title: EzCoordsHUD
description: Lightweight plugin for displaying coordinates above your hotbar
body:
EzCoordsHUD is a lightweight and user-friendly Minecraft plugin designed to make tracking your in-game location effortless. Once installed, it automatically displays your current X, Y, and Z coordinates, along with your world and biome, directly on your screen in a clear and customizable format. This heads-up display (HUD) updates in real time as you move, ensuring you always know exactly where you are.

Players can easily toggle the coordinates display on or off with a simple command, making it ideal for both survival adventurers and builders who need precise positioning. The plugin supports rich text formatting, allowing server owners to personalize the look and feel of the HUD to match their server’s style or player preferences.

EzCoordsHUD is perfect for anyone who wants quick access to essential location information without cluttering their screen or relying on the debug menu. It’s a great tool for navigation, building, and exploration, enhancing the overall Minecraft experience for players of all types.

Permissions
coords.toggle - Allows toggling coordinates display.

Commands:
/coords - Toggles coordinates display.
